text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that creates machines capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. At its core, AI involves programming computers to learn from data and make decisions. A key part of this is machine learning, where systems improve their performance through experience without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced subset is deep learning, which uses artificial neural networks to process large amounts of information, much like the human brain. You encounter AI in daily life when using voice assistants, streaming service recommendations, or online search engines. As AI evolves, it continues to transform how we work and interact with technology.
